global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with geometric shapes and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting cashback offers with a call to action.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background that fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and warm base.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large square and a smaller circle in a lighter shade of orange, positioned in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional geometric shape
elements.description: A medium-sized square in a lighter shade of orange, also centered, complementing the other shapes.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle in a lighter shade of orange, positioned near the bottom center, enhancing the geometric theme.

elements.label: Cashback offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Earn cashback daily' with a smaller line below it in white, conveying a promotional message.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fast signup; instant card

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: The word 'SwiftStack' in bold, dark text at the top, serving as the brand identifier.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Watch now' at the bottom, encouraging user action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, cashback offer, SwiftStack logo, Watch now button
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by geometric shapes in the center, with body text above the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, Fast signup, instant card, SwiftStack, Watch now
